meta.description: 沪教版六年级核心词汇 + GE=3难度分级
meta.source: 牛津上海版六年级上下册 + GE=3词汇补充
meta.difficulty_note: Level 1-2: GE=2基础词 | Level 3: GE=3核心词 | Level 4-5: GE=3-4挑战词

words.meaning_en: a place where things are made
words.sentence: The car factory makes 100 cars every day.
words.sentence_cn: 这家汽车工厂每天生产100辆车。

words.meaning_en: dirty things that make air or water bad
words.sentence: Air pollution is bad for the city race.
words.sentence_cn: 空气污染对城市比赛不利。

words.meaning_en: to break or ruin something
words.sentence: The storm destroyed the old race track.
words.sentence_cn: 暴风雨摧毁了旧赛道。

words.meaning_en: to keep someone or something safe
words.sentence: Drivers wear helmets to protect their heads.
words.sentence_cn: 车手戴头盔保护头部。

words.meaning_en: the world around us — air, water, land
words.sentence: A clean environment makes the city better.
words.sentence_cn: 干净的环境让城市更美好。

words.meaning_en: to use old things again in a new way
words.sentence: We recycle old tires to make the road safer.
words.sentence_cn: 我们回收旧轮胎让道路更安全。

words.meaning_en: cars and buses on the road
words.sentence: There is a lot of traffic on the way to the race.
words.sentence_cn: 去比赛的路上交通很拥挤。

words.meaning_en: a machine that carries people, like a car or bus
words.sentence: A race car is a very fast vehicle.
words.sentence_cn: 赛车是一种非常快的车辆。

words.meaning_en: a person who rides in a car or bus
words.sentence: There is no passenger in a race car.
words.sentence_cn: 赛车里没有乘客。

words.meaning_en: a show where people can see things
words.sentence: There is a car exhibition at the park today.
words.sentence_cn: 今天公园里有一个车展。

words.meaning_en: something that does work for us
words.sentence: A race car is a very powerful machine.
words.sentence_cn: 赛车是一台非常强大的机器。

words.meaning_en: to make something new that did not exist
words.sentence: Who invented the first car engine?
words.sentence_cn: 谁发明了第一个汽车引擎？

words.meaning_en: facts about something
words.sentence: The driver needs information about the track.
words.sentence_cn: 车手需要关于赛道的信息。

words.meaning_en: using science to make things
words.sentence: New technology makes cars go faster.
words.sentence_cn: 新技术让汽车跑得更快。

words.meaning_en: to have a party because you are happy
words.sentence: The team will celebrate after winning the race.
words.sentence_cn: 车队赢了比赛后会庆祝。

words.meaning_en: how fast something moves
words.sentence: The top speed of this car is 300 km/h.
words.sentence_cn: 这辆车的最高速度是每小时300公里。

words.meaning_en: to go faster
words.sentence: The driver will accelerate on the straight road.
words.sentence_cn: 车手会在直道上加速。

words.meaning_en: something that makes a car stop or slow down
words.sentence: Use the brake before the corner!
words.sentence_cn: 弯道前要刹车！

words.meaning_en: the wheel that controls the car's direction
words.sentence: He turned the steering wheel to the left.
words.sentence_cn: 他把方向盘转向左边。

words.meaning_en: the person who wins first place
words.sentence: She wants to be the champion of the race.
words.sentence_cn: 她想成为比赛的冠军。

words.meaning_en: to try to win against others
words.sentence: Ten drivers will compete in the final race.
words.sentence_cn: 十位车手将在决赛中竞争。

words.meaning_en: winning a game or race
words.sentence: The team showed great joy at their victory.
words.sentence_cn: 车队对胜利感到非常高兴。

words.meaning_en: to do something many times to get better
words.sentence: The driver practices on the track every morning.
words.sentence_cn: 车手每天早上在赛道上练习。

words.meaning_en: something hard that you try to do
words.sentence: This race track is a big challenge for new drivers.
words.sentence_cn: 这条赛道对新来说车手是个大挑战。

words.meaning_en: being brave when something is scary
words.sentence: It takes courage to drive at 300 km/h.
words.sentence_cn: 以300公里的时速驾驶需要勇气。

words.meaning_en: very happy because something fun is happening
words.sentence: The fans are excited about the race!
words.sentence_cn: 车迷们对比赛感到兴奋！

words.meaning_en: feeling worried or afraid
words.sentence: The young driver felt nervous before the race.
words.sentence_cn: 年轻的车手在比赛前感到紧张。

words.meaning_en: sure that you can do something well
words.sentence: She is confident she will win the race.
words.sentence_cn: 她确信自己会赢得比赛。

words.meaning_en: sad because something did not go well
words.sentence: He was disappointed when his car broke down.
words.sentence_cn: 他的车坏了，他很失望。

words.meaning_en: feeling good about something you did
words.sentence: The driver was proud of his first place finish.
words.sentence_cn: 车手对获得第一名感到自豪。

words.meaning_en: not safe; can hurt you
words.sentence: Driving in the rain is dangerous.
words.sentence_cn: 在雨中开车很危险。

words.meaning_en: very strong
words.sentence: The new car engine is very powerful.
words.sentence_cn: 新车的引擎非常强大。

words.meaning_en: known by many people
words.sentence: Shanghai International Circuit is a famous race track.
words.sentence_cn: 上海国际赛车场是著名的赛道。

words.meaning_en: very good, the best
words.sentence: That was an excellent lap time!
words.sentence_cn: 那是一个非常棒的单圈时间！

words.meaning_en: very, very big
words.sentence: The race stadium is enormous.
words.sentence_cn: 赛车场非常巨大。

words.meaning_en: not curved or bent
words.sentence: The driver went very fast on the straight part of the road.
words.sentence_cn: 车手在直道上开得很快。

words.meaning_en: not straight; bending
words.sentence: The curved part of the track is hard to drive.
words.sentence_cn: 赛道的弯道部分很难开。

words.meaning_en: not being in danger
words.sentence: Safety is the most important thing in racing.
words.sentence_cn: 安全是赛车中最重要的事。

words.meaning_en: something bad that happens by mistake
words.sentence: There was a small accident on the track today.
words.sentence_cn: 今天赛道上发生了一个小事故。

words.meaning_en: to fix something that is broken
words.sentence: The team needs to repair the car before the next race.
words.sentence_cn: 车队需要在下场比赛前修好车。

words.meaning_en: the part of a car that makes it move
words.sentence: The car has a very loud engine.
words.sentence_cn: 这辆车的引擎声音很大。

words.meaning_en: the round part that makes a car move
words.sentence: The car has four wheels.
words.sentence_cn: 车有四个轮子。

words.meaning_en: something that makes a car or machine run
words.sentence: The car needs more fuel to finish the race.
words.sentence_cn: 车需要更多燃料才能完成比赛。

words.meaning_en: a place where cars stop to get fixed during a race
words.sentence: The driver went to the pit to change tires.
words.sentence_cn: 车手进站换胎。

words.meaning_en: the round rubber part on a wheel
words.sentence: New tires make the car go faster.
words.sentence_cn: 新轮胎让车跑得更快。

words.meaning_en: a hard hat that protects your head
words.sentence: Always wear a helmet when riding a bike.
words.sentence_cn: 骑自行车时一定要戴头盔。

words.meaning_en: a prize you get for winning
words.sentence: The champion lifted the golden trophy.
words.sentence_cn: 冠军举起了金色奖杯。

words.meaning_en: a big place for sports and races
words.sentence: Thousands of fans filled the stadium.
words.sentence_cn: 成千上万的车迷挤满了体育场。

words.meaning_en: a special road for racing
words.sentence: The race track is 5 kilometers long.
words.sentence_cn: 赛道长5公里。

words.meaning_en: to end something; the end of a race
words.sentence: He crossed the finish line first!
words.sentence_cn: 他第一个冲过终点线！

words.meaning_en: a long trip from one place to another
words.sentence: The journey to the race track took two hours.
words.sentence_cn: 去赛道的旅程花了两个小时。

words.meaning_en: how far away something is
words.sentence: The distance between the two cars is getting smaller.
words.sentence_cn: 两辆车之间的距离越来越小。

words.meaning_en: the way something is going
words.sentence: The driver changed direction at the corner.
words.sentence_cn: 车手在弯道处改变了方向。

words.meaning_en: what something is made of
words.sentence: The car body is made of a light material.
words.sentence_cn: 车身是用轻质材料做的。

words.meaning_en: the power to do things
words.sentence: The driver needs a lot of energy for a long race.
words.sentence_cn: 车手在长距离比赛中需要很多精力。

words.meaning_en: to look at something carefully
words.sentence: The team will examine the car after the race.
words.sentence_cn: 车队在比赛后会检查赛车。

words.meaning_en: to picture something in your mind
words.sentence: Imagine driving a car at 300 km/h!
words.sentence_cn: 想象一下以300公里的时速开车！

words.meaning_en: to find something for the first time
words.sentence: The team discovered a problem with the brakes.
words.sentence_cn: 车队发现了刹车的问题。

words.meaning_en: to need something
words.sentence: Racing requires a lot of skill and practice.
words.sentence_cn: 赛车需要很多技巧和练习。

words.meaning_en: to give something to someone
words.sentence: The team will provide new tires for the race.
words.sentence_cn: 车队将为比赛提供新轮胎。

words.meaning_en: to get something
words.sentence: The driver received a gold medal.
words.sentence_cn: 车手收到了一枚金牌。

words.meaning_en: to tell people about someone or something new
words.sentence: Let me introduce you to our new driver.
words.sentence_cn: 让我介绍一下我们的新车手。

words.meaning_en: to get ready for something
words.sentence: The team is preparing the car for tomorrow's race.
words.sentence_cn: 车队正在为明天的比赛准备赛车。

words.meaning_en: to do something you worked hard for
words.sentence: She achieved her dream of becoming a race driver.
words.sentence_cn: 她实现了成为赛车手的梦想。

words.meaning_en: to do well and get what you want
words.sentence: With hard work, you can succeed in anything.
words.sentence_cn: 通过努力，你可以在任何事上取得成功。

words.meaning_en: to not do well; to not pass
words.sentence: Do not be afraid to fail. Try again!
words.sentence_cn: 不要害怕失败。再试一次！

words.meaning_en: to make something better
words.sentence: The driver wants to improve his lap time.
words.sentence_cn: 车手想提高自己的单圈速度。

words.meaning_en: to grow or make something new
words.sentence: The team is developing a faster car.
words.sentence_cn: 车队正在开发一辆更快的车。

words.meaning_en: to make something new
words.sentence: The designer created a beautiful new car.
words.sentence_cn: 设计师创造了一辆漂亮的新车。

words.meaning_en: something that helps you win
words.sentence: New tires give the driver an advantage.
words.sentence_cn: 新轮胎给车手带来了优势。

words.meaning_en: how hot or cold something is
words.sentence: The tire temperature is very important in racing.
words.sentence_cn: 轮胎温度在赛车中非常重要。

words.meaning_en: to find the size or amount of something
words.sentence: The team will measure the car's speed.
words.sentence_cn: 车队会测量车的速度。

words.meaning_en: to talk and share ideas
words.sentence: The driver and team communicate by radio.
words.sentence_cn: 车手和车队通过无线电沟通。

words.meaning_en: something you learn from doing things
words.sentence: The old driver has a lot of racing experience.
words.sentence_cn: 老车手有很多赛车经验。

words.meaning_en: things you have learned
words.sentence: A good driver needs knowledge of the track.
words.sentence_cn: 一个好的车手需要了解赛道知识。

words.meaning_en: something that helps you
words.sentence: Starting first gives you a big advantage.
words.sentence_cn: 第一个起步给你很大的优势。

words.meaning_en: a sign that tells you something
words.sentence: The red light is the signal to stop.
words.sentence_cn: 红灯是停车的信号。

words.meaning_en: to watch something carefully
words.sentence: The driver observed the other cars on the track.
words.sentence_cn: 车手观察赛道上的其他车辆。

words.meaning_en: to make someone interested in something
words.sentence: The race attracts fans from all over the world.
words.sentence_cn: 比赛吸引了来自世界各地的车迷。

words.meaning_en: a large group of people
words.sentence: A big crowd came to watch the race.
words.sentence_cn: 一大群人来看比赛。

words.meaning_en: people who watch a show or race
words.sentence: The audience cheered when the car crossed the line.
words.sentence_cn: 当车冲过终点线时，观众欢呼起来。

words.meaning_en: someone who helps for free
words.sentence: Many volunteers help at the race track.
words.sentence_cn: 很多志愿者在赛道帮忙。

words.meaning_en: a person who does something very brave
words.sentence: The driver is a hero to many young fans.
words.sentence_cn: 这位车手是很多年轻车迷的英雄。

words.meaning_en: the kind of person you are
words.sentence: A good driver has strong character.
words.sentence_cn: 一个优秀的车手性格坚韧。

words.meaning_en: what you think about something
words.sentence: In my opinion, this is the best race track.
words.sentence_cn: 我认为这是最好的赛道。

words.meaning_en: maybe; it might be true
words.sentence: Perhaps the rain will stop before the race.
words.sentence_cn: 也许比赛前雨就会停。

words.meaning_en: even though something is true
words.sentence: Although he was tired, he kept driving.
words.sentence_cn: 虽然他很累，但他继续驾驶。

words.meaning_en: but; on the other hand
words.sentence: The car was fast. However, it used too much fuel.
words.sentence_cn: 车很快。然而它用了太多燃料。

words.meaning_en: very much; more than others
words.sentence: I love racing, especially Formula 1.
words.sentence_cn: 我喜欢赛车，尤其是F1。

words.meaning_en: right now; without waiting
words.sentence: The driver stopped immediately when he saw the red flag.
words.sentence_cn: 车手看到红旗后立刻停车。

words.meaning_en: happening very quickly and without warning
words.sentence: Suddenly, it started to rain during the race.
words.sentence_cn: 比赛中突然下起了雨。

words.meaning_en: most likely
words.sentence: He will probably win the next race.
words.sentence_cn: 他大概会赢下一场比赛。

words.meaning_en: before now; by this time
words.sentence: The driver has already finished three laps.
words.sentence_cn: 车手已经跑完三圈了。

words.meaning_en: well and strong
words.sentence: A driver must be healthy and fit.
words.sentence_cn: 车手必须健康且强壮。

words.meaning_en: physical activity to keep you healthy
words.sentence: Drivers exercise every day to stay strong.
words.sentence_cn: 车手每天锻炼保持强壮。

words.meaning_en: to take air in and out of your body
words.sentence: Take a deep breath before the race starts.
words.sentence_cn: 比赛开始前深呼吸。

words.meaning_en: something you take when you are sick
words.sentence: The team doctor gave him some medicine.
words.sentence_cn: 队医给了他一些药。

words.meaning_en: able to wait without getting angry
words.sentence: A good driver must be patient.
words.sentence_cn: 一个好车手必须有耐心。

words.meaning_en: sun, rain, wind — the condition of the sky
words.sentence: Bad weather can make racing very dangerous.
words.sentence_cn: 恶劣的天气会让赛车非常危险。

words.meaning_en: the loud sound during a storm
words.sentence: The race was stopped because of thunder and lightning.
words.sentence_cn: 因为雷电，比赛中止了。

words.meaning_en: the light and heat from the sun
words.sentence: The race took place under bright sunshine.
words.sentence_cn: 比赛在明媚的阳光下进行。

words.meaning_en: thick cloud near the ground
words.sentence: The fog made it hard to see the track.
words.sentence_cn: 雾让人很难看清赛道。

words.meaning_en: air that moves
words.sentence: Strong wind pushed the car off the track.
words.sentence_cn: 强风把车推离了赛道。

words.meaning_en: water falling from the sky
words.sentence: Rain makes the track very slippery.
words.sentence_cn: 雨水让赛道变得很滑。

words.meaning_en: a place where flowers and plants grow
words.sentence: The race track is near a beautiful garden.
words.sentence_cn: 赛道附近有一个美丽的花园。

words.meaning_en: a very tall piece of land
words.sentence: The road goes up the mountain.
words.sentence_cn: 路沿着山往上走。

words.meaning_en: a very big body of water
words.sentence: You can see the ocean from the race track.
words.sentence_cn: 从赛道上可以看到大海。

words.meaning_en: a piece of land in the water
words.sentence: They built a new race track on the island.
words.sentence_cn: 他们在岛上建了一条新赛道。

words.meaning_en: a very dry place with a lot of sand
words.sentence: Racing in the desert is very hot.
words.sentence_cn: 在沙漠中赛车非常热。

words.meaning_en: the world of plants, animals, and weather
words.sentence: We should protect nature and keep the air clean.
words.sentence_cn: 我们应该保护自然，保持空气清新。

words.meaning_en: when the ground shakes
words.sentence: An earthquake damaged the road last year.
words.sentence_cn: 去年地震损坏了道路。

words.meaning_en: too much water on the land
words.sentence: The flood covered the road near the river.
words.sentence_cn: 洪水淹没了河边的道路。

words.meaning_en: a very big animal with a long nose
words.sentence: The elephant walked slowly across the road.
words.sentence_cn: 大象慢慢地穿过马路。

words.meaning_en: a smart sea animal
words.sentence: We saw dolphins in the ocean near the circuit.
words.sentence_cn: 我们在赛场附近的海里看到了海豚。

words.meaning_en: a big bird that flies very high
words.sentence: The eagle flew over the mountains.
words.sentence_cn: 鹰飞过山脉。

words.meaning_en: a very small animal, like an ant or bee
words.sentence: A small insect hit the driver's visor.
words.sentence_cn: 一只小虫子撞到了车手的护目镜上。

words.meaning_en: something that can hurt you
words.sentence: High speed brings danger.
words.sentence_cn: 高速带来危险。

words.meaning_en: a thick forest in hot places
words.sentence: The road goes through the dark jungle.
words.sentence_cn: 路穿过黑暗的丛林。

words.meaning_en: something very valuable
words.sentence: The trophy is like a treasure for the winner.
words.sentence_cn: 奖杯对获胜者来说就像宝藏。

words.meaning_en: a machine that can do things like a person
words.sentence: Scientists are making robots that can drive cars.
words.sentence_cn: 科学家正在制造能开车的机器人。

words.meaning_en: something that flows, like water
words.sentence: Cars need liquid fuel to run.
words.sentence_cn: 车需要液体燃料才能跑。

words.meaning_en: a tool used to do something
words.sentence: The driver checks the instruments on the dashboard.
words.sentence_cn: 车手检查仪表盘上的仪器。

words.meaning_en: a piece of cloth on a stick
words.sentence: The man waved the checkered flag at the finish.
words.sentence_cn: 终点处的人挥舞格子旗。

words.meaning_en: a picture that shows places
words.sentence: Look at the map to find the race track.
words.sentence_cn: 看地图找到赛道。

words.meaning_en: something you use to take photos
words.sentence: Many cameras filmed the race.
words.sentence_cn: 很多相机拍摄了比赛。

words.meaning_en: special clothes that everyone in a group wears
words.sentence: The race team wears a red uniform.
words.sentence_cn: 赛车队穿红色制服。

words.meaning_en: a group of things you have gathered
words.sentence: He has a collection of toy race cars.
words.sentence_cn: 他收藏了很多玩具赛车。

words.meaning_en: a message asking someone to come
words.sentence: She got an invitation to watch the Grand Prix.
words.sentence_cn: 她收到了观看大奖赛的邀请。

words.meaning_en: a book with news and pictures
words.sentence: I read a magazine about Formula 1.
words.sentence_cn: 我读了一本关于F1的杂志。

words.meaning_en: paper with daily news
words.sentence: The race result was in the newspaper.
words.sentence_cn: 比赛结果登在报纸上。

words.meaning_en: to say what something is like
words.sentence: Can you describe how fast the car went?
words.sentence_cn: 你能描述一下车开得有多快吗？

words.meaning_en: to talk about something together
words.sentence: The team discussed how to make the car faster.
words.sentence_cn: 车队讨论如何让车跑得更快。

words.meaning_en: to make something easy to understand
words.sentence: The engineer explained how the engine works.
words.sentence_cn: 工程师解释了引擎的工作原理。

words.meaning_en: to tell someone an idea
words.sentence: I suggest we change the tires now.
words.sentence_cn: 我建议我们现在换轮胎。

words.meaning_en: to say you will do something
words.sentence: The driver promised to do his best.
words.sentence_cn: 车手承诺会尽力而为。

words.meaning_en: to say something is good
words.sentence: I recommend this book about racing cars.
words.sentence_cn: 我推荐这本关于赛车的书。

words.meaning_en: to say you are not happy about something
words.sentence: The driver complained about the bad weather.
words.sentence_cn: 车手抱怨天气不好。

words.meaning_en: to say you are sorry
words.sentence: He apologized for bumping into the other car.
words.sentence_cn: 他为撞到另一辆车道歉。

words.meaning_en: to make someone feel brave or happy
words.sentence: The team encouraged the driver before the race.
words.sentence_cn: 比赛前车队鼓励了车手。

words.meaning_en: to make someone pay for doing wrong
words.sentence: The driver was punished for speeding in the pit lane.
words.sentence_cn: 车手因在维修通道超速受到惩罚。

words.meaning_en: to look at how things are different or the same
words.sentence: Let's compare the two cars' speeds.
words.sentence_cn: 让我们比较两辆车的速度。

words.meaning_en: to have something as part of a group
words.sentence: The race includes three different tracks.
words.sentence_cn: 比赛包括三条不同的赛道。

words.meaning_en: to make something
words.sentence: This factory produces car parts.
words.sentence_cn: 这家工厂生产汽车零件。

words.meaning_en: to make something more or bigger
words.sentence: The driver increased his speed on the last lap.
words.sentence_cn: 车手在最后一圈提高了速度。

words.meaning_en: to make something less or smaller
words.sentence: The team reduced the car's weight to go faster.
words.sentence_cn: 车队减轻了车重以提高速度。

words.meaning_en: to stop something from happening
words.sentence: Safety rules prevent accidents on the track.
words.sentence_cn: 安全规则防止赛道事故。

words.meaning_en: to think about something carefully
words.sentence: The driver must consider when to pit stop.
words.sentence_cn: 车手必须考虑何时进站。

words.meaning_en: to come into sight
words.sentence: A problem appeared with the car's brakes.
words.sentence_cn: 车的刹车出了问题。

words.meaning_en: to go away; you cannot see it anymore
words.sentence: The other car disappeared in the fog.
words.sentence_cn: 另一辆车消失在雾中。

words.meaning_en: to tell someone not to forget
words.sentence: The radio reminded the driver to slow down.
words.sentence_cn: 无线电提醒车手减速。

words.meaning_en: a small, hard baked food
words.sentence: The driver ate a biscuit before the race.
words.sentence_cn: 车手在比赛前吃了一块饼干。

words.meaning_en: a sweet brown food
words.sentence: The winner got a box of chocolate.
words.sentence_cn: 获胜者得到了一盒巧克力。

words.meaning_en: bread with meat or cheese inside
words.sentence: She made a sandwich for lunch at the race.
words.sentence_cn: 她在比赛时做了一个三明治当午餐。

words.meaning_en: a sweet drink made from lemons
words.sentence: It is hot. Let's drink some lemonade.
words.sentence_cn: 天很热。我们喝点柠檬水吧。

words.meaning_en: a small, sweet, red fruit
words.sentence: I like to eat strawberry ice cream.
words.sentence_cn: 我喜欢吃草莓冰淇淋。

words.meaning_en: a place where people eat food
words.sentence: The team went to a restaurant after the race.
words.sentence_cn: 车队比赛后去了一家餐厅。

words.meaning_en: something you put in food to make it
words.sentence: What ingredients do you need to make a cake?
words.sentence_cn: 做蛋糕需要什么原料？

words.meaning_en: to bring something to someone
words.sentence: They will deliver the new car next week.
words.sentence_cn: 他们下周会交付新车。

words.meaning_en: the gas in air that we breathe
words.sentence: Fire needs oxygen to burn.
words.sentence_cn: 火需要氧气才能燃烧。

words.meaning_en: the force that keeps us on the ground
words.sentence: Gravity makes the car stay on the road.
words.sentence_cn: 重力让车保持在路面上。

words.meaning_en: a test to learn something
words.sentence: The team did an experiment with new tires.
words.sentence_cn: 车队用新轮胎做了一次实验。

words.meaning_en: the power that makes lights and machines work
words.sentence: Electric cars use electricity instead of fuel.
words.sentence_cn: 电动车用电而不是燃料。

words.meaning_en: something that stores power
words.sentence: The electric car has a big battery.
words.sentence_cn: 电动车有一个大电池。

words.meaning_en: the part of a computer you type on
words.sentence: Use the arrow keys on the keyboard to drive.
words.sentence_cn: 用键盘上的方向键来开车。

words.meaning_en: the flat part of a computer or TV that shows pictures
words.sentence: You can see the race on the big screen.
words.sentence_cn: 你可以在大屏幕上看比赛。

words.meaning_en: a page on the internet
words.sentence: Check the website for race results.
words.sentence_cn: 上网站查看比赛结果。

words.meaning_en: to join things together
words.sentence: Connect your phone to see the live race.
words.sentence_cn: 连接你的手机观看比赛直播。

words.meaning_en: to make a machine work
words.sentence: The driver knows how to operate the car.
words.sentence_cn: 车手知道如何操作赛车。

words.meaning_en: a set of instructions for a computer
words.sentence: The computer programme controls the car's speed.
words.sentence_cn: 电脑程序控制车的速度。

words.meaning_en: the child of your uncle or aunt
words.sentence: My cousin also likes watching car races.
words.sentence_cn: 我的表弟也喜欢看赛车比赛。

words.meaning_en: a person who lives near you
words.sentence: My neighbor has a very fast red car.
words.sentence_cn: 我的邻居有一辆很快的红色车。

words.meaning_en: a person from another country
words.sentence: Many foreigners come to watch the Shanghai Grand Prix.
words.sentence_cn: 很多外国人来看上海大奖赛。

words.meaning_en: a person you do not know
words.sentence: A stranger helped the driver fix his tire.
words.sentence_cn: 一个陌生人帮车手修好了轮胎。

words.meaning_en: a person who flies a plane
words.sentence: A pilot and a driver both need great skill.
words.sentence_cn: 飞行员和车手都需要高超的技巧。

words.meaning_en: a person who rides in a car
words.sentence: A bus has many passengers.
words.sentence_cn: 公共汽车有很多乘客。

words.meaning_en: a person who helps you learn
words.sentence: My teacher said racing is an exciting sport.
words.sentence_cn: 我的老师说赛车是一项激动人心的运动。

words.meaning_en: a person who studies science
words.sentence: Scientists work hard to make cars safer.
words.sentence_cn: 科学家努力让汽车更安全。

words.meaning_en: a person who does magic tricks
words.sentence: The driver's move on the last lap was like magic.
words.sentence_cn: 车手最后一圈的操作简直像魔术。

words.meaning_en: a show where people see things
words.sentence: We went to a car exhibition on Sunday.
words.sentence_cn: 我们周日去看了车展。

words.meaning_en: a place where old and interesting things are shown
words.sentence: There is a racing car museum in the city.
words.sentence_cn: 城市里有一个赛车博物馆。

words.meaning_en: a place where planes take off and land
words.sentence: The driver flew to the next race from the airport.
words.sentence_cn: 车手从机场飞去参加下一场比赛。

words.meaning_en: a place where you can borrow books
words.sentence: I found a book about cars in the library.
words.sentence_cn: 我在图书馆找到一本关于汽车的书。

words.meaning_en: the area outside the city with farms and fields
words.sentence: The road goes through the green countryside.
words.sentence_cn: 路穿过绿色的乡村。

words.meaning_en: a mountain that can shoot out fire and rock
words.sentence: No one can race near an active volcano.
words.sentence_cn: 没有人能在活火山附近赛车。

words.meaning_en: a colorful arch in the sky after rain
words.sentence: A rainbow appeared after the rain stopped.
words.sentence_cn: 雨停后出现了彩虹。

words.meaning_en: a big place for sports
words.sentence: The stadium was full of excited fans.
words.sentence_cn: 体育场里满是兴奋的车迷。

words.meaning_en: a part of a big company or organization
words.sentence: The engineering department designs the car.
words.sentence_cn: 工程部门设计赛车。

words.meaning_en: the state of something
words.sentence: The track condition is bad because of the rain.
words.sentence_cn: 因为下雨，赛道状况很差。

words.meaning_en: what is happening at a time
words.sentence: The situation on the track was very dangerous.
words.sentence_cn: 赛道上的情况很危险。

words.meaning_en: where something is; your place in a race
words.sentence: He is in first position!
words.sentence_cn: 他排在第一位！

words.meaning_en: when you look at or think about something carefully
words.sentence: The driver must pay attention to the road.
words.sentence_cn: 车手必须注意路况。

words.meaning_en: a link between two things
words.sentence: There is a strong connection between speed and danger.
words.sentence_cn: 速度和危险之间有很强的联系。

words.meaning_en: something people do for a long time
words.sentence: Racing is a great tradition in this city.
words.sentence_cn: 赛车是这个城市的伟大传统。

words.meaning_en: learning at school or from books
words.sentence: Good education helps you understand the world.
words.sentence_cn: 良好的教育帮助你理解世界。

words.meaning_en: the people who lead a country
words.sentence: The government built a new highway for the race.
words.sentence_cn: 政府为比赛修建了一条新公路。

words.meaning_en: an event where people try to win
words.sentence: The racing competition is on Sunday.
words.sentence_cn: 赛车比赛在周日。

words.meaning_en: a special event for something important
words.sentence: The winner stood on the podium at the ceremony.
words.sentence_cn: 获胜者在典礼上站在领奖台上。

words.meaning_en: something told to people officially
words.sentence: The announcer made an announcement about the race.
words.sentence_cn: 广播员宣布了比赛的消息。

words.meaning_en: when people talk to each other
words.sentence: The two drivers had a conversation about the race.
words.sentence_cn: 两位车手讨论了比赛。

words.meaning_en: the happy feeling when something goes well
words.sentence: Winning gave the driver great satisfaction.
words.sentence_cn: 获胜给了车手极大的满足感。

words.meaning_en: liked by many people
words.sentence: Formula 1 is very popular around the world.
words.sentence_cn: F1在全世界非常受欢迎。

words.meaning_en: can happen; can be done
words.sentence: Is it possible to win from last place?
words.sentence_cn: 从最后一名赢可能吗？

words.meaning_en: something you must have or do
words.sentence: It is necessary to wear a seatbelt.
words.sentence_cn: 系安全带是必要的。

words.meaning_en: you can get it or use it
words.sentence: Are tickets available for the race?
words.sentence_cn: 比赛有票吗？

words.meaning_en: worth a lot of money or very useful
words.sentence: The gold trophy is very valuable.
words.sentence_cn: 金色的奖杯非常有价值。

words.meaning_en: feeling nice and relaxed
words.sentence: The new car seat is very comfortable.
words.sentence_cn: 新车的座椅非常舒适。

words.meaning_en: tasting very good
words.sentence: The food at the race was delicious.
words.sentence_cn: 比赛时的食物很美味。

words.meaning_en: very, very good
words.sentence: That was a fantastic race!
words.sentence_cn: 那是一场精彩的比赛！

words.meaning_en: very bad
words.sentence: The weather was terrible for racing.
words.sentence_cn: 天气对赛车来说太糟糕了。

words.meaning_en: very surprising and good
words.sentence: The driver made an amazing move!
words.sentence_cn: 车手做了一个惊人的动作！

words.meaning_en: very nice or pretty
words.sentence: The race track looks lovely in spring.
words.sentence_cn: 春天的赛道看起来很美。

words.meaning_en: soft and kind
words.sentence: The curve is gentle, so you can go fast.
words.sentence_cn: 弯道很平缓，所以你可以开快。

words.meaning_en: not loose; very narrow
words.sentence: This is a very tight corner.
words.sentence_cn: 这是一个非常急的弯。

words.meaning_en: not wide
words.sentence: The road is narrow here. Drive carefully!
words.sentence_cn: 这里的路很窄。小心驾驶！

words.meaning_en: flat and even
words.sentence: The track is very smooth.
words.sentence_cn: 赛道非常平整。

words.meaning_en: not smooth
words.sentence: The rough road made the car shake.
words.sentence_cn: 崎岖的路让车颠簸。

words.meaning_en: hard to stand on; easy to fall
words.sentence: The road is slippery when it rains.
words.sentence_cn: 下雨时路很滑。

words.meaning_en: level, not hilly
words.sentence: This part of the track is flat.
words.sentence_cn: 赛道的这一段是平的。

words.meaning_en: going up or down sharply
words.sentence: The hill is too steep for a car.
words.sentence_cn: 山太陡了，车开不上去。

words.meaning_en: very good
words.sentence: That was an excellent lap!
words.sentence_cn: 那是一个出色的单圈！

words.meaning_en: a plan to achieve something
words.sentence: The team made a good strategy for the race.
words.sentence_cn: 车队为比赛制定了好策略。

words.meaning_en: a big competition to find the best
words.sentence: He won the world championship this year!
words.sentence_cn: 他今年赢得了世界冠军！

words.meaning_en: to be good enough to enter
words.sentence: The driver needs to qualify for the final race.
words.sentence_cn: 车手需要获得决赛资格。

words.meaning_en: to pass another car
words.sentence: The driver tried to overtake on the straight.
words.sentence_cn: 车手试图在直道上超车。

words.meaning_en: when two things crash into each other
words.sentence: The collision damaged both cars.
words.sentence_cn: 碰撞损坏了两辆车。

words.meaning_en: how well someone or something does
words.sentence: The car's performance was perfect today.
words.sentence_cn: 今天赛车的性能很完美。

words.meaning_en: to stop working or competing
words.sentence: The famous driver will retire after this season.
words.sentence_cn: 这位著名车手将在本赛季后退役。

words.meaning_en: the place where winners stand
words.sentence: The top three drivers stood on the podium.
words.sentence_cn: 前三名车手站在领奖台上。

words.meaning_en: a person who designs or builds machines
words.sentence: The engineers worked all night on the car.
words.sentence_cn: 工程师们整夜在研究赛车。

words.meaning_en: a person who fixes machines and cars
words.sentence: The mechanic fixed the engine in 10 minutes.
words.sentence_cn: 机械师在10分钟内修好了引擎。

words.meaning_en: one complete trip around a track
words.sentence: The driver completed 50 laps in the race.
words.sentence_cn: 车手在比赛中跑了50圈。

words.meaning_en: the best result ever achieved
words.sentence: She broke the lap record by 2 seconds.
words.sentence_cn: 她把单圈纪录提高了2秒。

words.meaning_en: to try hard to get or achieve something
words.sentence: He pursued his dream of becoming a champion.
words.sentence_cn: 他追求成为冠军的梦想。

words.meaning_en: a good chance to do something
words.sentence: The open track gave him an opportunity to pass.
words.sentence_cn: 空旷的赛道给了他超车的机会。

words.meaning_en: something you must do or take care of
words.sentence: The team leader has great responsibility.
words.sentence_cn: 车队负责人有重大的责任。

words.meaning_en: a strong wish to do or be something great
words.sentence: His ambition is to win the world championship.
words.sentence_cn: 他的抱负是赢得世界冠军。

words.meaning_en: able to do things by yourself
words.sentence: A good driver must be independent and quick-thinking.
words.sentence_cn: 一个好车手必须独立且反应迅速。

words.meaning_en: correct and without mistakes
words.sentence: The driver's timing was very accurate.
words.sentence_cn: 车手的时机把握非常准确。

words.meaning_en: something that blocks your way
words.sentence: The driver avoided the obstacle on the road.
words.sentence_cn: 车手避开了路上的障碍。

words.meaning_en: a hole through a mountain or under the ground
words.sentence: The car drove fast through the tunnel.
words.sentence_cn: 车快速穿过隧道。
